race.comment: MARUNOUCHI (9) was well supported over this track and trip on debut and didn't let backers down with a dominant victory. Winning hoop Thompson stays on top and should get all the favours from the inside alley. Can go back-to-back to start the career. ANDI DON'T CARE (8) goes well for rider Jones who has a win and three placings from just five steers. Has to be included. GRAMMAR LAD (3) kicked off this campaign last time out with a fourth over 1200m at this track. Fitter and looks a strong place chance. AVE CANTARE (10) returned in good order last start, beaten only 0.7 lengths when second at Sunshine Coast over 1200m. Include.
